stories.name: Julius Mwangi
stories.tagline: Got my Boxer in 2 hours. 14 months later I owned it.

stories.name: Mary Wanjiku
stories.tagline: Saved KES 8,400 a month — same car, lower payments.

stories.name: Peter Otieno
stories.tagline: Two tuk-tuks, two riders. The numbers finally work.

stories.name: Grace Achieng
stories.tagline: Stocked the shop for the whole season in one go.

stories.name: Samuel Kiprop
stories.tagline: My first car. My family's first holiday.

stories.name: Rose Njeri
stories.tagline: Paid school fees on time. No drama. No stress.

stories.name: David Kamau
stories.tagline: Topped up against my boda. Bought a second one.

stories.name: Esther Wambui
stories.tagline: KES 50 a day. M-Pesa changed my whole business.

stories.name: Anthony Mutua
stories.tagline: Bought tools. Hired two apprentices. Got busier.
